mapper.select:
select sr.sid as sid, sr.uid as uid, sr.sign_in_time as signInTime, sr.sign_out_time as signOutTime, sr.sign_in_status as signInStatus, sr.sign_out_status as signOutStatus, sr.remark as remark, sr.create_time as createTime, u.username as username, u.name as name from sign_record sr left join `user` u on sr.uid = u.uid
sr.uid = #{uid} u.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%') and u.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') and sr.sign_in_status like concat('%', #{signInStatus}, '%') and sr.sign_out_status like concat('%', #{signOutStatus}, '%')
order by create_time desc

select sr.sid as sid, sr.uid as uid, sr.sign_in_time as signInTime, sr.sign_out_time as signOutTime, sr.sign_in_status as signInStatus, sr.sign_out_status as signOutStatus, sr.remark as remark, sr.create_time as createTime, u.username as username from sign_record sr left join `user` u on sr.uid = u.uid where sr.uid = #{uid} and sr.sign_out_time is null order by sr.create_time desc limit 1

select sr.sid as sid, sr.uid as uid, sr.sign_in_time as signInTime, sr.sign_out_time as signOutTime, sr.sign_in_status as signInStatus, sr.sign_out_status as signOutStatus, sr.remark as remark, sr.create_time as createTime, u.username as username from sign_record sr left join `user` u on sr.uid = u.uid where sr.uid = #{uid} order by sr.sign_in_time desc limit 1
mapper.update:
update sign_record
sign_out_time = #{signOutTime}, sign_out_status = #{signOutStatus}, remark = #{remark}, create_time = #{createTime},
mapper.insert: insert into sign_record(uid, sign_in_time, sign_out_time, sign_in_status, sign_out_status, remark, create_time) values(#{uid}, #{signInTime}, #{signOutTime}, #{signInStatus}, #{signOutStatus}, #{remark}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select sr.sid as sid, sr.uid as uid, sr.sign_in_time as signInTime, sr.sign_out_time as signOutTime, sr.sign_in_status as signInStatus, sr.sign_out_status as signOutStatus, sr.remark as remark, sr.create_time as createTime, u.username as username from sign_record sr left join `user` u on sr.uid = u.uid where sr.uid = #{uid} and DATE(sr.sign_in_time) = CURDATE() order by sr.sign_in_time desc limit 1
SELECT DISTINCT DATE(sign_in_time) as sign_date FROM sign_record WHERE uid = #{uid} ORDER BY sign_date DESC
